from source import knapsack

def test_knapsack_item_exactly_fills_capacity():
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]
    result = knapsack(capacity, items)
    assert result == 10, f"Expected optimal value 10 when item exactly fills capacity, got {result}"
